focus: correctness: topology reproducibility and phase identity

findingDetails.title: Authoritative phase tree is not reproducible from its generator
findingDetails.evidence: Generator replay removes phase 005 child 004 and changes totals from 176/157 to 175/156.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add the executor child to TOP and enforce byte-for-byte no-diff regeneration.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Direct generator replay plus manifest, parent, and graph comparison.
findingDetails.claim: The checked-in authoritative phase tree cannot be regenerated from its declared source.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: Checked parent and graph metadata for evidence that the fourth child was intentionally non-generated.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: A documented post-process might add the node, but none is present.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: A documented reproducible generation pipeline that preserves the node.

findingDetails.title: Root execution contract retains superseded phase identities
findingDetails.evidence: Current success and risk text routes through phases 014/015 and obsolete meanings for 007/009/011 despite a 000-011 map.
findingDetails.recommendation: Reconcile every operational phase reference to the current map and label historical numbering explicitly.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Exact stale-number sweep compared with root map and graph metadata.
findingDetails.claim: Operational parent prose points executors at superseded phases.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: Compared the current phase map, handoffs, and graph child list.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: The numbers could be historical, but they are phrased as current success and mitigation steps.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Historical labels are explicit and all executable destinations name current phases.

noveltyJustification: First pass found two independent current-contract failures.

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: The parent controls 176 generated phase nodes.

searchLedger.invariant: The declared generator reproduces the authoritative manifest.

searchActions.queryOrPath: build-phase-tree.mjs to temporary output then cmp/diff
searchActions.result: Replay removed child 004 and changed totals.

searchLedger.invariant: Operational prose names current executable phases.

searchActions.result: Current success and risk sections retain superseded destinations.

searchLedger.rationale: Executors can run the wrong phase.
